title: RPG Systems
description: RPG Systems but in Minecraft! Parties, Health bars, Damage numbers, etc...
body: ## RPG Systems is a modular RPG-style toolkit that brings familiar MMORPG features to Minecraft: parties, pets, 3D health bars, floating damage/healing numbers, player titles, and more — all fully toggleable via configs. ## Current content: ## Now at 1.0.3.5, supports FTB Teams! ## Now at 1.0.4, supports Party Addon! ### Party System: * Friendly fire prevention (your projectiles pass through party members) * Choose who your Spell Engine healing / buffing can affect * Invite players or request to join via a keybind while looking at them * Party-only chat panel * Directional arrows on the party HUD to help locate members * View party members’ status effects on the HUD ### Health bar, Damage & Healing Numbers ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1337672/description_3c0afc18-4d1a-40e1-8dbb-04ed606eac52.gif) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1337672/description_e7c89fda-6b9e-46e6-84c3-3994bc4cd03e.gif) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1337672/description_42554f36-33da-4f7e-9a7c-f273459dadbe.gif) ### Titles System [(GUIDE)](https://github.com/KevzCz/RPG-Systems/blob/1.21.1/README.md) * Titles that grant bonuses: Attributes, Spells (Spell Engine), and Powers * Add conditions to unlock titles * Animate titles using built-in tokens or custom textures at `block/title/*.png` & `block/title/*.png.mcmeta` ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1337672/description_18270ca0-360e-4c0f-8971-a83c9756372a.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1337672/description_edf0d376-21e7-46fa-adaa-7549f2cb662a.png) ### Pet System (Planned) * A way to manage your pets [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PixelDreamStudios/SPEC_PixelDreamStudios_Promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/PixelDream)
